infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: LobbyRush uses the microphone so you can record voice notes in chat.
infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: LobbyRush can use the camera when you choose to add a profile picture.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: LobbyRush can access selected photos when you upload a profile picture.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryAddUsageDescription: LobbyRush can save shared images only when you choose to download them.
